qna_pairs.Query: What type of cuisine is the Lemon Pickle I recipe?
What ingredients are required for the Lemon Pickle I recipe?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: 12 small or 6 large lemons, 1/2 cup salt, 1/4 cup red chile powder, 1/2 cup sugar, 3 tsp turmeric powder, 1 tsp fenugreek seed, 1 tsp black mustard seed, 1/4 tsp asafoetida powder (optional)

qna_pairs.Query: What is the purpose of the procedure in the Lemon Pickle I recipe?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: There is no procedure listed in the recipe
